2605.31446.title: Fine-grained Verification via Diagnostic Reasoning Supervision for Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction
2605.31446.paper_summary: Aspect Sentiment Triplet Extraction (ASTE) aims to identify aspect terms, opinion terms, and sentiment polarities as structured triplets, providing essential inputs for downstream information system applications such as opinion mining, explainable recommendations, and review summarization. Prior work mainly focuses on end-to-end extraction, while post hoc verification of extracted triplets remains comparatively underexplored. This gap limits the reliability of ASTE systems, since predicted triplets may be locally plausible while being globally invalid. Moreover, candidate invalidity is multi-faceted and candidate usability is inherently graded, motivating a fine-grained verification mechanism that can filter or re-rank outputs from diverse extractors. In this paper, we propose FiVeD, a framework for Fine-grained Verification with Diagnostic reasoning supervision. Specifically, the verifier is trained with multiple complementary objectives, including validity classification and quality score estimation as primary tasks, with error type classification and rationale generation as auxiliary tasks. We define hierarchical error categories and construct plausible incorrect triplets under semantic and syntactic constraints, and leverage an off-the-shelf LLM with task-specific rubrics to produce quality scores and diagnostic rationales. During inference, the resulting quality scores are used to filter candidate outputs, supporting adjustable precision-recall tradeoffs. Experiments across multiple ASTE baselines demonstrate that FiVeD consistently improves extraction performance by up to 3.53 F1 points as a plug-and-play verification module.
2605.31446.paper_summary_zh: 方面情感三元組提取（ASTE）旨在識別方面術語、意見術語和情感極性作為結構化的三元組，為下游信息系統應用提供必要的輸入，如意見挖掘、可解釋的推薦和評論摘要。之前的工作主要集中在端到端提取，而對提取三元組的事後驗證則相對未被充分探索。這一差距限制了ASTE系統的可靠性，因為預測的三元組可能在局部上是合理的，但在全局上卻無效。此外，候選無效性是多方面的，候選可用性本質上是分級的，這促使我們需要一種細粒度的驗證機制，能夠過濾或重新排序來自不同提取器的輸出。在本文中，我們提出了FiVeD，一個細粒度驗證框架，具有診斷推理監督。具體而言，驗證器是通過多個互補目標進行訓練的，包括有效性分類和質量評分估計作為主要任務，錯誤類型分類和推理生成作為輔助任務。我們定義了分層錯誤類別，並在語義和語法約束下構建合理的錯誤三元組，並利用現成的LLM和特定任務的評分標準來產生質量評分和診斷推理。在推理過程中，生成的質量評分用於過濾候選輸出，支持可調的精確度-召回權衡。在多個ASTE基準上的實驗表明，FiVeD作為即插即用的驗證模塊，始終能將提取性能提高最多3.53個F1點。
2605.31446.author: Wenna Lai et.al.
2605.31446.authors: Wenna Lai, Haoran Xie, Guandong Xu, Qing Li, S. Joe Qin
